case_title: HAMAMCIYAN, ARTIN vs. LIM, CHENG KEOQUDONE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMAMCIYAN, ARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIM, CHENG KEOQUDONE MRS. CHENG KEOQUDONE LIM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 150 TOLAND ST, UNIT #2 $4,014.45 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $274.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,038.45, LEASE FORFEITED
